query:
INSERT INTO instance_content_update_checks (
			content_entry_id,
			update_channel,
			update_version_id,
			checked_at
		)
		VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)
		ON CONFLICT(content_entry_id) DO UPDATE SET
			update_channel = excluded.update_channel,
			update_version_id = excluded.update_version_id,
			checked_at = excluded.checked_at
